UAA was established in the year 1964 by a group of like minded youth to help the people affected by natural calamities and to further efforts in starting educational institutions. Since then it has been working with downtrodden sections of society with focus on women and children. UAA is headquartered at Ganjam in Ganjam district of Odisha.
